permits.description: interior remodel of both 1st & 2nd floors: new finishes, furniture fixture & equipment, electrical & mechanical systems, new public toilet facilities. correct access issues at sidewalk, curb ramp & exterior book drop. refurbish perimeter bookshelves & windows.
roof repair. exterior wall waterproof coating. exterior window repairs and painting. remove and replace existing roof access ladder in kind (ladder under a separate permit).
fire life safety alarm system on both floors. install manual pull stations, smoke detectors, relays, heat detectors and strobes.
temporary shoring and underpinning for new building at 1748 haight st on prop line app 200011014647s
remodel existing fire sprinkler system in basement to accomodate new wall lay out. relocate 10 heads, add 5 heads, total 15 heads on ground floor.
